items.title: This emerging treatment is helping people avoid knee replacement surgery
items.summary: A minimally invasive treatment called GAE is helping people with chronic knee pain get back to gardening, cycling, and other activities without undergoing knee replacement surgery. Early studies suggest the procedure can provide years of relief by reducing inflammation inside the joint.

items.title: Scientists say most people need more protein than current guidelines suggest
items.summary: A new review suggests that doing more exercise and eating more protein than current minimum recommendations may help people stay stronger, sharper, and more independent as they age. items.title: Zašto hormoni mogu biti uzrok debljanja i što možete učiniti

items.title: Butterfly that barely ages could help unlock longevity secrets
items.summary: Scientists discovered that Heliconius butterflies have evolved an extraordinary lifespan, living several times longer than closely related species.
